mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT028#Sql001 */ ORDER_NO , BROKER_CODE, BRAND_CODE, BUTEN_CODE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ORDER_COUNT, ORDER_STATUS, TRADE_TYPE, APPOINT_PRICE FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER WHERE BUTEN_CODE = #{fct028Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct028Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber}) AND BRAND_CODE = #{fct028Sql001RequestModel.brandCode} AND DEPOSIT_TYPE = #{fct028Sql001RequestModel.depositType} AND ORDER_STATUS IN ('10','30') AND ORDER_DAY = TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')
